abilities.description: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself 3 tiles.Upgraded: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself ten tiles. Units in your path get trampled over.

translation.ru_description: Пукни на юнита, сделав рывок на 3 клетки вперед. Ему Яд 3
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Пукни на юнита, сделав рывок на 10 клетки вперед.
Растопчите всех на пути. Ему Яд 3
translation.en_description: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself 3 tiles.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself ten tiles. Units in your path get trampled over.

abilities.description: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself 3 tiles.Upgraded: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself ten tiles. Units in your path get trampled over.

translation.en_upgraded_description: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself ten tiles. Units in your path get trampled over.

abilities.description: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 10 damage in a large cone with knockback.Upgraded: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 15 damage and inflict Bruise in a large cone with knockback.

translation.ru_description: Катите кота-шар. При ударе: 10 урона в большом конусе с отбрасыванием.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Катите кота-шар. При ударе: 15 урона и Ушиб в большом конусе с отбрасыванием.
translation.en_description: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 10 damage in a large cone with knockback.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 15 damage and inflict Bruise in a large cone with knockback.

abilities.description: Inflict Rot on a unit and it moves away from you.Upgraded: Inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on a unit and it moves away from you.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Гниль на юнита, и он убегает от вас.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Гниль 2 и Яд 2 на юнита, и он убегает от вас.
translation.en_description: Inflict Rot on a unit and it moves away from you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on a unit and it moves away from you.

abilities.description: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat.Upgraded: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat. Gain 5 health for each unit killed.

translation.ru_description: Убейте всех юнитов с 3 или менее Здоровья. Они станут мясом.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Убейте всех юнитов с 3 или менее Здоровья. Они станут мясом. +5 ОЗ вам за каждого.
translation.en_description: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat. Gain 5 health for each unit killed.

abilities.description: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy.Upgraded: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy. Gain double the effects of these pickups.

translation.ru_description: Соберите все предметы, затем впадите в Сон.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Соберите все предметы, затем впадите в Сон. Получите двойной эффект от предметов.
translation.en_description: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy. Gain double the effects of these pickups.

abilities.description: Collect an adjacent pickup. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.Upgraded: Collect a pickup in range 5. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.

translation.ru_description: Подберите соседний лут. Вместо эффекта дайте оружию Яд 1 до конца битвы.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Подберите лут в радиусе 5. Вместо эффекта дайте оружию Яд 1 до конца битвы.
translation.en_description: Collect an adjacent pickup. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Collect a pickup in range 5. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.

abilities.description: Take 2 damage. Summon a Rot Fly.Upgraded: Take 2 damage. Summon a Rot Fly.

translation.ru_description:
Получите 2 урона.
Призовите Гнилостную Муху.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:

Summon a Rot Fly.

abilities.description: Blow wind that inflicts Poison 4 in a cone. The cone is larger the less health you have.Upgraded: Blow wind that inflicts Poison 4 in a cone. The cone is larger the less health you have. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Выдохните ветер, накладывающий Яд 4 в конусе. Конус тем шире, чем меньше у вас здоровья.

[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]

translation.en_description: Inflict Poison 2 and Burn 2 on a unit in melee range.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Poison 2 and Burn 2 in a small cone.

abilities.description: Collect a pickup within two tiles of you.Upgraded: Collect all pickups within two tiles of you.

translation.ru_description: Соберите предмет в радиусе двух клеток от вас.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Соберите ВСЕ предметы в радиусе двух клеток от вас.
translation.en_description: Collect a pickup within two tiles of you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Collect all pickups within two tiles of you.

abilities.description: Eat a unit and take damage equal to that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.Upgraded: Eat a unit within range 2 and take damage equal to half of that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.

translation.ru_description: Съешьте юнита и получите урон, равный его оставшимся ОЗ. Нельзя есть боссов и крупных юнитов.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Съешьте юнита в радиусе 2 и получите урон (50% от его ОЗ). Нельзя есть боссов и крупных.
translation.en_description: Eat a unit and take damage equal to that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Eat a unit within range 2 and take damage equal to half of that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.

abilities.description: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 1 and Poison 1 on units that contact you.Upgraded: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on units that contact you.

translation.ru_description: Прыгните на любую свободную клетку и усните. Во сне накладывайте Гниль 1 и Яд 1 при контакте.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Прыгните на свободную клетку и усните. Во сне накладывайте Гниль 2 и Яд 2 при контакте.
translation.en_description: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 1 and Poison 1 on units that contact you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on units that contact you.

abilities.description: Trample one tile toward the nearest food pickup.Upgraded: Trample two tiles toward the nearest food pickup.

translation.ru_description: Растопчите одну клетку в сторону ближайшей еды.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Растопчите две клетки в сторону ближайшей еды.
translation.en_description: Trample one tile toward the nearest food pickup.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Trample two tiles toward the nearest food pickup.

abilities.description: Move four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.Upgraded: Trample over four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.

translation.ru_description: Пройдите 4 клетки. Стоит тем дешевле, чем меньше у вас ОЗ.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Растопчите 4 клетки. Стоит тем дешевле, чем меньше у вас ОЗ.
translation.en_description: Move four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Trample over four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.

abilities.description: Vomit up the last consumable you ate this battle and equip it. (Castable once per battle.) Upgraded: Vomit up the last consumable you ate this battle and equip it. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Сблевните последний съеденный расходник и экипируйте его.
[s:.7](Раз за битву.)[/s]
